findings.title: Database connection string with embedded credentials
findings.why: DB credentials are committed in source.
findings.remediation: Load credentials from a secret manager; rotate the password.

findings.title: Unguarded PHI read endpoint (no authentication)
findings.why: No authentication dependency on a PHI route.
findings.remediation: Require an authenticated principal on every PHI route.

findings.title: PHI transmitted over cleartext to an external host
findings.why: PHI travels over plain http to an external host.
findings.remediation: Use https/TLS for every PHI transmission.

findings.title: PHI create without audit event
findings.why: A new patient record is written with no audit event.
findings.reviewer_question: Is every PHI write recorded with actor + action + resource?
findings.remediation: Emit an audit event on every PHI create/read/update/delete.

findings.title: Unredacted PHI interpolated into LLM prompt
findings.why: Raw identifiers flow into the model prompt without redaction.

findings.title: No abstain path on weak retrieval
findings.why: The assistant answers even when retrieval is empty.
findings.remediation: Abstain or surface low confidence on weak retrieval.

findings.title: JWT (test-fixture path — verify it is not a real credential)
findings.why: Token literal in a test path.
findings.remediation: Use generated fixtures, not pasted tokens.
